D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Lumens, Candela, Lux & Nits

follow one lamp's light from total flux to intensity, illuminance and luminance

Luminous flux Φ (lumen) is total light. Intensity I = Φ/Ω (candela) is flux per steradian. Illuminance E = I/d² (lux) is what lands on a surface, falling with the square of distance.

Set the lamp's flux, its beam half-angle, and the distance to the wall. Watch the beam tighten into more candela, and the wall illuminance drop as 1/d². The patch brightness tracks lux.
